post_copy_actions: Update package.json repository to atomicstrata/atomicmemory with directory packages/mcp-server.
Update package.json homepage and bugs URLs to the monorepo issue tracker.
Run npm pack --dry-run --json and reconcile the published file list against this allowlist.
notes: Source lives inside atomicmemory-integrations under packages/mcp-server. No host-specific config needs to ship; configuration travels with the user's MCP client.
